SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: EXCLUDED_TIER_PRE_ICL 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: Y = Yes

X = Unknown 

COMMENT: This variable was new in 2012. THE CCW constructs the Plan Characteristics file from information 
submitted by Part D plan sponsors to CMS’s Health Plan Management System (HPMS).
